summary: Frontend testing of comprehensive UI fixes. Verified: 1) Soul badge glass container effect (bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-lg), 2) Soul badge contextual messaging (Start/Continue/Completed), 3) Soul badge click navigates to /pet-soul/{petId}, 4) Trait badges with glass effect and float-gentle animation, 5) Multi-pet breed-based unique traits, 6) Pet switching across pillar pages via petSelectionChanged event.

issues: Browser crashes when taking screenshots on pet-soul page - may indicate heavy rendering or memory issues

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Soul badge uses correct glass effect classes: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-lg border-white/10
✅ Contextual messaging correctly shows Start (0%), Continue (1-50%), keep going (51-99%), shines bright (100%)
✅ Soul badge is an <a> tag linking to /pet-soul/${pet.id}
✅ Trait badges use float-gentle keyframes animation with staggered delays
✅ BREED_TRAIT_POOLS provides unique traits per breed (shih tzu, golden retriever, labrador, beagle, pug, german shepherd)
✅ getUniqueTraitsForPet() uses hash function for consistent but varied trait selection per pet
✅ PillarContext listens to petSelectionChanged event and updates currentPet state
✅ Farewell pillar has empathetic messaging: 'I'll move at your pace here', 'Support with dignity and care'
seed_data_creation: Used existing test@example.com with 3 pets (TestMeister-ShihTzu, Lola-Maltese, Mojo-Indie)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working. Test user: test@example.com/password123 with 3 pets. Browser automation may crash when navigating to pet-soul pages during screenshot capture.

verified_features.soul_badge_contextual_messaging: PASS - Shows 'Start TestMeister's soul journey' for 0% score
verified_features.trait_badges_animation: PASS - float-gentle animation with staggered delays confirmed
verified_features.multi_pet_unique_traits: PASS - TestMeister(ShihTzu): Gentle spirit, Nap enthusiast, Affectionate | Lola(default): Joy bringer, Cuddle buddy, Magical friend
verified_features.pet_switching_pillar_pages: PASS - Switched from TestMeister to Lola, hero updated to 'Celebrations for Lola'
verified_features.pet_photo_fallback: PASS - Code includes photo_url, profile_image, image_url, image, photo, DiceBear fallback
verified_features.farewell_empathy_messaging: PASS - Pillar messages include empathetic content
